properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are good, You are good When there's nothing good in me You are love, You are love On display for all to see You are light, You are light When the darkness closes in You are hope, You are hope You have covered all my sin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are peace, You are peace When my fear is crippling You are true, You are true Even in my wandering You are joy, You are joy You're the reason that I sing You are life, You are life, In You death has lost its sting

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, I’m running to Your arms, I’m running to Your arms The riches of Your love Will always be enough Nothing compares to Your embrace Light of the world forever reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are more, You are more Than my words will ever say You are Lord, You are Lord All creation will proclaim You are here, You are here In Your presence I'm made whole You are God, You are God Of all else I'm letting go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My heart will sing no other Name Jesus, Jesus
